description: Rigby's stale file audit flagged .fuse_hidden* (14 files) and .DS_Store (5 files) as stale artifacts to delete. These are macOS system files that belong where they are — not stale, not actionable. Audit produced a false-positive cleanup list of 19 files, none of which should be touched.
correction: .fuse_hidden* and .DS_Store are system-managed files. They should not be flagged in stale file audits. Audits should focus on files the IES system created or manages, not OS-level artifacts.
systemic_fix: Root/stale audits must exclude OS-managed files (.DS_Store, .fuse_hidden*, .Spotlight-V100, .Trashes, etc.) from findings. Only flag files that IES agents or workflows created.
